register.title: Yenza i-akhawunti
register.subtitle: Ngenisa iinkcukacha zakho ukuze uqalise
register.successMessage: Enkosi ngokubhalisa. Ukwenza iakhawunti yakho isebenze, nceda ujonge i-imeyile yakho kwaye ucofe kwikhonkco lokuqinisekisa esikuthumelele lona.
register.passwordTooShort: Igama eligqithisiweyo kufuneka libe nophawu olu-6 ubuncinane

twoFactor.title: Ubungqina bezinto ezimbini
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Ngenisa ikhowudi enamanani ama-6 kwi-app yakho yokuqinisekisa
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Ngenisa enye yeekhowudi zakho zokubuyisela ukuze ungene
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Nceda ufake ikhowudi yokubuyisela esebenzayo (ifomathi: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.helpText: Ngaba unayo ingxaki? Qhagamshelana nenkxaso ukuze ufumane uncedo.

setup.subtitle: Masikulungiselele. Nceda ukhethe uhlobo lwe-akhawunti yakho ukuqhubeka.
setup.clinicDescription: Ndimele ikliniki yezonyango okanye iziko lezempilo elineengcali ezininzi
setup.labDescription: Ndimele ilabhoratri yokuxilonga okanye iziko lovavanyo
setup.setupError: Ayiphumelelanga ukugqibezela ukumiselwa kwenkqubo yekhompyutha. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

messages.errorFallback: Ayiphumelelanga ukuvula kwakhona i-imeyili Nceda uzame kwakhona.

success.title: Jonga i-imeyile yakho
success.description: Nceda ujonge ibhokisi yakho engenayo kwaye ulandele imiyalelo yokuseta kwakhona iphasiwedi yakho. Ikhonkco liphela kwiyure eli-1.

form.title: Ulibale iphasiwedi yakho?
form.description: Ngenisa i-imeyile yakho kwaye siya kukuthumela ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona.

messages.requirementsMissing: Nceda uhlangabezane nazo zonke iimfuno ze-password
messages.errorFallback: Ayiphumelelanga ukuvula kwakhona igama lokuthela. Kusenokwenzeka ukuba unxulumano luphelelwe lixesha.

form.title: Vula kwakhona kwakhona i-password yakho
form.description: Ngenisa i-password yakho entsha apha ngezantsi.
form.requirementsMet: Igama eligqithisiweyo liyahlangabezana nazo zonke iimfuno

messages.invalidLink: Unxulumaniso olungaqinisekiswanga. Nceda usebenzise ikhonkco kwi-imeyile yakho.
messages.errorFallback: Ayiphumelelanga ukuqinisekisa i-imeyili Kusenokwenzeka ukuba unxulumano luphelelwe lixesha.

state.loadingDescription: Nceda ulinde ngelixa siqinisekisa idilesi yakho ye-imeyile ...

success.nextStep: Ngoku ungangena kwiakhawunti yakho nge-imeyile yakho kunye negama lokugqitha.

error.helpText: Ukuba oku kuyaqhubeka, qhagamshelana nenkxaso okanye ubhalise kwakhona.
